final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for cross-border e-commerce promotion with layered typography and product integration.

Style/medium: bold graphic design poster, layered typography art with depth and dimension, editorial layout inspired by modern advertising campaigns
Composition: 16:9 horizontal format, dynamic layered text arrangement with overlapping type elements, product or subject partially obscuring text layers, balanced visual hierarchy
Subject: promotional messaging with artistic display typography, stacked and layered letterforms creating depth, physical product or main subject intersecting with text
Scene/backdrop: clean but visually rich environment that supports the promotional theme without competing with typography
Lighting/mood: even studio lighting that highlights text layers and product, energetic promotional atmosphere
Color palette: bold contrasting colors for text hierarchy, cohesive palette that unifies complex elements without chaos
Materials/textures: crisp vector typography with subtle dimensional effects, clean product surfaces, controlled texture variety
Constraints: text must remain legible despite layering, product integration must feel intentional not accidental, complexity without visual clutter
Avoid: unreadable text, random clutter without purpose, disconnected product placement, generic stock photo aesthetic, excessive drop shadows
